category_title: Elementary student with ASD and limited verbal communication who protests via screaming and falling to the floor
scenario_title: One-on-one academic work session with unfamiliar tasks
minimal_context: Sylvia is sitting one-on-one with an educator for a 30-minute work session to complete academic assignments.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Sylvia, it is time for our work session. Here is a new assignment for you to look at.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best on this new worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks away from the task and attempts to leave the designated classroom area.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please stay in your seat and focus on the paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Screams, cries, and falls to the floor on her knees, kicking to protest the unfamiliar activity.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Sylvia, it is time for our work session. Here is a new assignment for you to look at.

STUDENT: Wonder Pets to the rescue.

TUTOR: Just try your best on this new worksheet.

STUDENT: (Looks away from the task and attempts to leave the designated classroom area.)

TUTOR: Please stay in your seat and focus on the paper.

STUDENT: (Screams, cries, and falls to the floor on her knees, kicking to protest the unfamiliar activity.)

task.content: Academic activities they had mastered (e.g., Ordering numbers 1–10, Verbally labeling letters A–Z, Matching pictures of the same item, Identifying common objects)

context.environment: One-on-one work with an assigned educator
context.materials: Academic activities they had mastered, novel assignments

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Presentation of unfamiliar work or nonpreferred activities
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Screamed, cried, and fell to the floor on her knees to protest; demonstrated head-butting, biting, kicking, hitting, and elopement
